title: Malty Turkish Lamb Steamed Dumplings
description: A delicious and romantic Turkish dish made with tender lamb, crispy baguette, and steamed to perfection.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine ground lamb, chopped onion, grated ginger, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper. Mix well until just combined.
Add chopped baguette to the lamb mixture and mix until the bread is evenly distributed.
Knead the mixture until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the mixture into 12 equal portions and shape each into a ball.
Roll out each ball into a thin circle and place a tablespoon of water in the center.
Fold the dough over to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal.
Steam the dumplings over boiling water for 10-12 minutes, or until cooked through.
Serve the dumplings hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
